summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Mobile Walkthrough UI and Resource Reorder feature. All backend tests passed (9/9). All mobile viewport tests passed for Login, Register (3 steps), and TeacherSetup pages. Resource reorder feature working correctly on both desktop (drag-and-drop + up/down buttons) and mobile (up/down buttons only).
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login returns token and role=admin
Backend: GET /api/lessons/{id} returns resources with order field
Backend: Resources are sorted by order field
Backend: PUT /api/resources/reorder accepts array of {id, order} and updates DB
Backend: Reorder endpoint requires authentication (returns 401/403)
Backend: PUT /api/resources/{id}/order updates single resource order
Backend: PUT /api/resources/{id}/primary sets resource as primary
Backend: GET /api/resources/{id}/download returns file content
Mobile Login (390x844): Logo, title, email input, password input, submit button all visible
Mobile Login: Card fits within viewport (width=358px)
Mobile Register Step 1: Name input visible and usable (width=308px)
Mobile Register Step 2: Invite code input visible and usable
Mobile Register Step 3: Email, password inputs and submit button visible
Mobile Register: All 3 steps fit within viewport
Mobile TeacherSetup Step 1: Group name input visible (width=292px)
Mobile TeacherSetup: Create group button visible
Mobile TeacherSetup: Card fits within viewport (width=358px)
Desktop Resources: GripVertical drag handles visible for teachers/admins
Desktop Resources: Up/down arrow buttons visible
Desktop Resources: First resource up button disabled
Desktop Resources: Last resource down button disabled
Desktop Resources: Drag-and-drop reorder works
Mobile Resources: Drag handles hidden (sm:block class)
Mobile Resources: Up/down arrow buttons visible
Mobile Resources: Reorder via buttons works
Code Review: isTeacherOrAdmin check correctly hides reorder controls for members

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all mobile viewport and reorder tests passed)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile walkthrough UI and resource reorder feature fully verified. Key findings: 1) All mobile viewports (390x844) display correctly without clipping for Login, Register (3 steps), and TeacherSetup pages. 2) Resource reorder works via PUT /api/resources/reorder endpoint. 3) Desktop shows drag handles + up/down buttons, mobile shows only up/down buttons. 4) First resource up button and last resource down button are correctly disabled. 5) Non-teacher users don't see reorder controls (isTeacherOrAdmin check in LessonDetail.jsx).

mobile_walkthrough_ui.login_page: All elements visible and usable on 390x844 viewport
mobile_walkthrough_ui.register_step1: Name input visible, card width=358px fits viewport
mobile_walkthrough_ui.register_step2: Invite code input visible, validation works
mobile_walkthrough_ui.register_step3: Email/password inputs visible, submit button works
mobile_walkthrough_ui.teacher_setup_step1: Group name input visible, create button works

resource_reorder.desktop_ui: GripVertical drag handles + up/down arrows visible
resource_reorder.mobile_ui: Only up/down arrows visible (drag handles hidden)
resource_reorder.button_states: First up disabled, last down disabled
